sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَى خَالِدٌ تَذْكِرَةَ الْقِطَارِ مِنَ الشِّبَّاكِ.
sentences.translation: Halid je kupio kartu za voz na šalteru.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid bought the train ticket at the counter.

sentences.translation: Karta je bila jeftina a putovanje kratko.
sentences.translationEn: The ticket was cheap and the journey was short.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَ خَالِدٌ بِجَانِبِ النَّافِذَةِ وَنَظَرَ إِلَى الْحُقُولِ.
sentences.translation: Halid je sjeo kraj prozora i gledao u polja.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid sat by the window and looked at the fields.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ إِلَى مَدِينَتِهِ مَسَاءً وَهُوَ سَعِيدٌ.
sentences.translation: Stigao je u svoj grad uvečer sretan.
sentences.translationEn: He arrived in his city in the evening feeling happy.
